Unpacking the Cutter 

Lift the cutter from the box and place it on a table. 

Among the parts, there is an accessory kit located separately, glued to the inside of the cutter box. This kit includes many accessories and a printed assembly guide. 

Assembling the Stand 

Locate all eight M5 by 18-millimeter screws and place a lock washer on each one. 

Carefully thread two of the screws into each of the horizontal panels. 

NOTE: Because you are driving steel screws into threaded aluminum, we strongly recommend hand-tightening as much as possible to avoid cross-threading the screws. 

Tighten each screw 7-8 full turns. 

Remove the plastic covers from the legs and put them aside. 

Carefully thread one of the M5 x 18 screws into each of the four remaining threaded holes in the horizontal panel. Tighten approximately 8 turns.

title: Easy How-to Guide for Applying Marabu Coatings by Hand
description: It’s easy to apply Marabu Clear Shield by hand. Before applying the coating, allow the print to dry for 24 hours. You will need a clean and dust-free surface, a paint tray, and a clean roller. Gently swirl the solution to mix and pour it into the tray. Keep the roller saturated as you apply the coating. Start at one edge and overlap as you move across the print. Allow to dry for 10-30 minutes, and then apply a second coating. Dry overnight or at least 12 hours before stretching.
